pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.0.4 to 3.2.0 to align with the target JDK 21 environment and access newer framework features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.x is not the target version for the migration; while it runs on JDK 17, the project explicitly targets 3.2.0 for JDK 21 compatibility and feature set.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to compile and run on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if JDK 21-specific APIs are used.
